title: Stylish Fashion Catalog Shoot Blending Streetwear Luxury
sourceTitle: Stylish Fashion Catalog Shoot Blending Streetwear Luxury

imagePrompts.prompt: Stylish fashion catalog shoot blending streetwear and luxury branding. Female model wearing burgundy slim-fit top and ivory tailored pants, posed in confident relaxed positions across multiple duplicated frames. Slight perspective tilt, dynamic layout collage, soft daylight studio lighting with warm tone grading. Modern shopping website aesthetic, minimal UI-inspired composition, high resolution fashion photography.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Stylish fashion catalog shoot blending streetwear and luxury branding. Female model wearing burgundy slim-fit top and ivory tailored pants, posed in confident relaxed positions across multiple duplicated frames. Slight perspective tilt, dynamic layout collage, soft daylight studio lighting with warm tone grading. Modern shopping website aesthetic, minimal UI-inspired composition, high resolution fashion photography.

imagePrompts.title: Stylish Fashion Catalog Shoot Blending Streetwear Luxury

prompt: Stylish fashion catalog shoot blending streetwear and luxury branding. Female model wearing burgundy slim-fit top and ivory tailored pants, posed in confident relaxed positions across multiple duplicated frames. Slight perspective tilt, dynamic layout collage, soft daylight studio lighting with warm tone grading. Modern shopping website aesthetic, minimal UI-inspired composition, high resolution fashion photography.
originalPrompt: Stylish fashion catalog shoot blending streetwear and luxury branding. Female model wearing burgundy slim-fit top and ivory tailored pants, posed in confident relaxed positions across multiple duplicated frames. Slight perspective tilt, dynamic layout collage, soft daylight studio lighting with warm tone grading. Modern shopping website aesthetic, minimal UI-inspired composition, high resolution fashion photography.

promptTranslations.zh: 时尚目录拍摄，融合街头潮流与奢华品牌风格。女性模特身穿勃艮第红修身上衣和象牙色剪裁长裤，多个框架中摆出自信放松姿势。略带透视倾斜，动态拼贴布局，柔和日光工作室灯光，暖色调调色。现代购物网站美学，极简用户界面灵感构图，高分辨率时尚摄影。
promptTranslations.fr: Séance photo catalogue mode stylée alliant streetwear et branding de luxe. Modèle féminin portant un haut bordeaux slim et un pantalon ivoire taillé, posant de façon confiante et décontractée à travers plusieurs cadres dupliqués. Légère inclinaison de perspective, mise en page collage dynamique, éclairage studio lumière du jour douce avec ton chaud. Esthétique site de shopping moderne, composition minimaliste inspirée UI, photographie mode haute résolution.
promptTranslations.ru: Стильная фэшн-съемка для каталога, сочетающая стритвир и люксовый брендинг. Женская модель в бордовом облегающем топе и молочных прямых брюках, позирует в уверенных расслабленных позах в нескольких дублированных кадрах. Лёгкий перспективный наклон, динамичный коллаж макета, мягкое дневное студийное освещение с тёплой цветокоррекцией. Современная эстетика сайта интернет-магазина, минималистичный UI-стиль композиции, высококачественная фэшн-фотография.
promptTranslations.pt: Sessão de fotos de catálogo fashion estilosa que mistura streetwear com branding de luxo. Modelo feminina usando blusa justa vinho e calça tailandesa marfim, posando em posições confiantes e relaxadas em vários quadros duplicados. Leve inclinação de perspectiva, layout colagem dinâmico, iluminação suave de estúdio em luz do dia com gradação de tom quente. Estética moderna de site de compras, composição minimalista inspirada em UI, fotografia de moda em alta resolução.
promptTranslations.ja: スタイリッシュなファッションカタログ撮影。ストリートウェアとラグジュアリーブランディングを融合。女性モデルがバーガンディのスリムフィットトップとアイボリーのテーラードパンツを着用、自信に満ちたリラックスしたポーズで複数の重複フレームに登場。わずかなパースによる傾き、ダイナミックなレイアウトコラージュ、柔らかい昼光のスタジオライティングに暖色トーンのグレーディング。現代的なショッピングウェブサイトの美学、ミニマルUI風構成、高解像度ファッション写真。
promptTranslations.ko: 스트리트웨어와 럭셔리 브랜드가 어우러진 스타일리시 패션 카탈로그 촬영. 여성 모델이 버건디 슬림핏 탑과 아이보리 맞춤형 팬츠를 착용, 자신감 있고 편안한 포즈로 여러 복제 프레임에 배치. 약간의 원근 틸트, 역동적인 콜라주 레이아웃, 따뜻한 톤 그레이딩의 부드러운 자연광 스튜디오 조명. 현대적 쇼핑 웹사이트 미학, 미니멀 UI 영감 구성, 고해상도 패션 사진.
